result.summary: ijenko.net exposes one documented HTTP API surface: the IoE² IoT API for building end-user applications, authenticated with an IJENKO-issued token supplied either as the `Access-Token` header or `token` query parameter.
result.description: IJENKO provides an IoT platform branded here as the IoE² API. Its published API is aimed at building end-user applications that work with accounts, devices, functionalities, places, programs, notifications, and related IoT resources.

ijenko_api_token.label: IoE² API token
ijenko_api_token.setup: Get an API token from the IJENKO developer portal at [developers.ijenko.com](http://developers.ijenko.com/). The published Swagger lists token-based authentication and indicates the developer portal as the contact/origin site for the API docs, but the portal was not directly readable during verification, so the exact minting clicks could not be confirmed.

surfaces.name: IoE² IoT API - to create end-user applications
